creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
www/node is a build dependency of www/firefox. The upgrade of www/firefox to 63.0 fails because the build of www/node exits with an error:

[...]
  LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/ports/www/node/work/node-v10.12.0/out/Release/lib.host:/usr/ports/www/node/work/node-v10.12.0/out/Release/lib.target:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH; export LD_LIBRARY_PATH; cd ../.; mkdir -p /usr/ports/www/node/work/node-v10.12.0/out/Release/obj.target/node_lib/src; dtrace -64 "-I/usr/ports/www/node/work/node-v10.12.0/out/Release/obj/gen" -Isrc -C -G -s src/v8ustack.d -o "/usr/ports/www/node/work/node-v10.12.0/out/Release/obj.target/node_lib/src/node_dtrace_ustack.o"
dtrace: failed to compile script src/v8ustack.d: "/usr/lib/dtrace/mbuf.d", line 114: syntax error near "caddr_t"
gmake[3]: *** [node_dtrace_ustack.target.mk:26: /usr/ports/www/node/work/node-v10.12.0/out/Release/obj.target/node_lib/src/node_dtrace_ustack.o] Error 1
gmake[3]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
rm d24bf83af8dd2703d3099cff7cd01f3f9edac79a.intermediate 178de1c80e6bd8c890deca96d4b99c8d46fd8432.intermediate 583d0855bd03dbd1769bfafd7027e3dbb7b7d5a2.intermediate
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:99: node] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/www/node/work/node-v10.12.0'
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1
[...]

uname -a:
FreeBSD yokozuna 11.2-STABLE FreeBSD 11.2-STABLE #0 r339023: Mon Oct  1 00:41:55 CEST 2018     root@yokozuna:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/YOKOZUNA  amd64

Regards,
Marco
